sector_applicability: JavaScript engines web browsers server runtimes tooling vendors and language conformance suites
why_it_matters: Defines the ECMAScript language used by JavaScript implementations across web and server platforms
notes: Ecma publishes ECMA-262 as the ECMAScript language specification

sector_applicability: APIs databases configuration formats messaging systems and web platforms
why_it_matters: Defines the syntax of JSON used for interoperable structured data interchange
notes: Ecma publishes ECMA-404 as the JSON data interchange syntax

sector_applicability: IoT platforms message brokers telemetry systems and constrained-device networks
why_it_matters: Defines lightweight publish subscribe messaging widely used for IoT telemetry and event-driven integration
notes: OASIS publishes MQTT Version 5.0 as an OASIS Standard

name_full: Open Document Format for Office Applications Version 1.2
sector_applicability: Office suites document archives public-sector document exchange and preservation programs
why_it_matters: Defines an open XML-based office document format used for text spreadsheets charts and presentations
notes: OASIS publishes OpenDocument Version 1.2 as an OASIS Standard

sector_applicability: Identity providers service providers enterprise single sign-on platforms and federated access systems
why_it_matters: Defines XML-based assertions protocols and bindings for federated identity and single sign-on
notes: OASIS publishes the SAML 2.0 specification set

sector_applicability: Cyber threat intelligence platforms security operations centers information sharing communities and incident response teams
why_it_matters: Defines a structured language for representing cyber threat intelligence objects and relationships
notes: OASIS publishes STIX Version 2.1 through its Cyber Threat Intelligence Technical Committee

sector_applicability: Cyber threat intelligence exchanges sharing hubs security tools and automated indicator distribution systems
why_it_matters: Defines application layer services and message exchanges for sharing cyber threat intelligence
notes: OASIS publishes TAXII Version 2.1 through its Cyber Threat Intelligence Technical Committee

sector_applicability: Brand owners retailers marketplaces product data platforms traceability systems and consumer information services
why_it_matters: Defines URI syntax for connecting GS1 identifiers to web resources and product data services
notes: GS1 publishes Digital Link as a web URI standard for GS1 identifiers

sector_applicability: Supply chains logistics providers regulators food and pharmaceutical traceability programs and event data repositories
why_it_matters: Defines interoperable event capture and sharing for what when where why traceability data
key_outputs: EPCIS and Core Business Vocabulary standard
notes: GS1 publishes EPCIS and CBV for interoperable supply chain event data

sector_applicability: Retail healthcare logistics manufacturing marketplaces and regulatory product identification systems
why_it_matters: Defines the core GS1 identification keys data carriers and application rules used across global supply chains
key_outputs: GS1 identification and barcode application rules
notes: GS1 publishes the General Specifications as the core application standard for GS1 identifiers and data carriers
